curation_notes: Re-curated with updated hint guidelines. The patch modifies 4 non-test source files (src/vtab/mod.rs, src/vtab/array.rs, src/vtab/csvtab.rs, src/vtab/series.rs), making it a noisy patch. The core fix is in src/vtab/mod.rs where read_only_module and eponymous_only_module were changed to return &'static Module<T> instead of Module<T>, and create_module was changed to require &'static Module<T>. The other three files are consumers updated to pass inline function results instead of lazy_static Module references. Locations derived from the patch diff, focused on mod.rs functions defining the vulnerable API. Vulnerability class kept as race-condition per CWE-362 and RUSTSEC-2020-0014 (Data races in rusqlite). L3 hints now properly differentiate from L1/L2 by specifying the virtual table subsystem.
